title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Senior Teacher in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
